reason: Verified agent chat functionality - agent responded to math question with correct answer containing "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully, displaying home page with agent list
Clicked agent "QA-20260630-230933-75nl" in sidebar — Agent page loaded, displaying agent settings and message input
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator shows "idle" ✓
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message appeared in chat input, send button clicked successfully
Waited for response — Agent responded immediately with "2 + 2 = 4" (well within 3 minute timeout)
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly states "2 + 2 = 4", screenshot captured successfully showing complete conversation
